categories.name: Automotive
categories.description: Vehicle data: makes, models, VINs, plates

types.description: Random floating-point number, configurable range and precision
True or false, with configurable probability
Free-form text, optionally constrained by regex or length
Pick from a list of allowed values (set via constraints.choices)
Auto-incrementing integer sequence starting from a base value
Full name of a person (given + family)
Generic license / registration number (medical, professional, government). Configurable via constraints.prefix and constraints.{min,max}_length; distinct from license_plate (vehicle).
Real US city name (curated; may not correlate with state column)
US state abbreviation (50 states + DC, no territories)
Real US ZIP code (curated; may not correlate with state/city)
ABO blood type with Rh factor
Date of birth for a person
Product name (food/goods proxy via mimesis dish)
Stock ticker symbol from well-known list
Monetary amount in a generic currency
Discount amount applied to a purchase
Tax rate as a percentage (0 to 25)
Date in the future (within next 365 days)
Date in the past (within last 365 days)
Time of day in HH:MM:SS format
URL pointing to a placeholder image
Semi-realistic book title from combinatorial word patterns (legacy port)
Multiple sentences forming a paragraph of prose
examples: Air economy leader cause even. Election tax prepare claim.
Office visit, established patient, moderate complexity

types.description: HCPCS Level II code (5 characters; CMS healthcare procedure code)
HCPCS procedure descriptor (correlates with hcpcs_code when both columns exist)
ICD-9-CM diagnosis code (3-5 chars; e.g. '25000', 'V7231', 'E8800'). Correlates with icd9_dx_desc_short and icd9_dx_desc_long when co-present.
Short descriptor for an ICD-9-CM diagnosis code (~24 chars; CMS public domain). Correlates with icd9_diagnosis_code when co-present.
examples: DMII wo cmp nt st uncntr

types.description: Long descriptor for an ICD-9-CM diagnosis code (~255 chars; CMS public domain). Correlates with icd9_diagnosis_code when co-present.
examples: Diabetes mellitus without mention of complication, type II or unspecified type, not stated as uncontrolled

types.description: ICD-9-CM procedure code (2-4 chars; e.g. '8151', '3891'). Correlates with icd9_proc_desc_short and icd9_proc_desc_long when co-present.
Short descriptor for an ICD-9-CM procedure code (~28 chars; CMS public domain). Correlates with icd9_procedure_code when co-present.
Long descriptor for an ICD-9-CM procedure code (CMS public domain). Correlates with icd9_procedure_code when co-present.
US hospital name (e.g. 'Mayo Clinic Hospital', 'Johns Hopkins Hospital'). Correlates with hospital_npi when co-present.
10-digit National Provider Identifier for a US hospital. Correlates with hospital_name when co-present.

examples: Massachusetts College of Art and Design (MassArt)

types.description: High-level business sector (top of industry taxonomy)
Sub-industry within an industry (bottom of taxonomy; pair with sector + industry for coherent triplets)
Product subcategory (pair with product_category for coherent pairs)
Specific product type (bottom of taxonomy; pair with product_category + product_subcategory for coherent triplets)
Vehicle model year, default range 1990 to current year + 1
Vehicle model name (correlates with car_make when both columns exist)
Generic corporate slogan sampled from a curated list of ~80 taglines
